description: Add a backend that uses the Linux kernel keyring via keyctl/add_key syscalls, distinct from secretx-keyring (Secret Service D-Bus API). The kernel keyring is zero-daemon, works headless, and is the native secret store used by LUKS, NFS, eCryptfs, and systemd-creds. Candidate crate: keyctl or linux-keyutils. Scope: SecretStore (get/put from user/session keyring). Signing not applicable.
title: Add secretx-keyctl backend (Linux kernel keyring)
